'''Beard-moss''' was a [[Moss/Legends|moss]] [[Species/Legends|species]] indigenous to [[Tenupe]]. It was known to grow in curtains on [[mogo tree]]s.

During the [[Swarm War]] [[Alema Rar]] used a curtain of beard-moss to conceal her [[StealthX]] in the upper reaches of a mogo tree during the [[Battle of Tenupe]].<ref name="DNIII TSW">''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]''
